positive: A hyper-stylized, minimalist geometric floral arrangement that forms a cohesive, repeating pattern. The main subject is an abstract wreath of interconnected lines and shapes, embodying stylized peony and leaf motifs. Use a bold, flat graphic design aesthetic, reminiscent of Art Deco meeting Japanese woodblock prints. The color palette must feature deep indigo blue, burnished gold, and crisp cream white. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, designed to work as a seamless repeat tile. Emphasize strong, clean silhouettes and sharp, crisp edges. The background should be solid cream, allowing the pattern to pop with high contrast. Perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, text, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, artifacts, gradients, photo-realistic, depth of field, photographic, logo, trademark
